hero.title: No Compromises on Your Coverage.
hero.subtitle: There are countless insurance policies out there. Most disappoint when it matters.
hero.description: We've done the filtering for you. You only get plans that deliver when you need them most. Quality over fine print.

services.title: Our Insurance Solutions. Fact-Based. Verified.
services.subtitle: Choose the optimal coverage for your individual needs. We offer tailored concepts for every area of life.

ambulant.title: Outpatient Supplementary Insurance
ambulant.description: Comprehensive outpatient coverage for specialist treatments, Heilpraktiker and preventive care. Up to €3,000 health budget.

zahn.title: Dental Supplementary Insurance
zahn.description: Complete dental protection for prophylaxis, treatments and dental prosthetics. Protects against high out-of-pocket costs with top-tier reimbursement rates.

stationaer.title: Hospital Supplementary Insurance
stationaer.description: Premium protection for hospital stays. Private room, chief physician treatment and free choice of hospital.

tier.title: Pet Health Insurance
tier.description: Comprehensive health protection for your pet. Reliably covers vet visits, surgeries and preventive care.
